title: Beverley Callard Leaves TV Show Because of Health
summary: Beverley Callard is an actress who had to leave a TV show called I'm A Celebrity... South Africa. She felt sick and passed out in the jungle camp. Later, she found out she has breast cancer. On the show, she was sad to leave because she wanted to finish and prove older women can do tough things. Her friends on the show supported her and said her health is important. Beverley is now fighting cancer and says she will beat it. This story shows how health can change plans and the importance of support from friends.

a wild, forested area with lots of plants and animals
how well your body feels and works

options: She moved to a new house

What did Beverley want to prove on the show?
options: Older women can do tough things

questions.question: Who supported Beverley when she left?

background_read: Beverley Callard is a famous actress from the UK who stars in a TV show called Coronation Street. She joined a reality TV show where celebrities live in a jungle and face challenges. Sometimes, people get sick and have to leave for their health. Cancer is a disease that affects many people, and it's important to get medical help. Friends can help when someone is going through a hard time.
Article_Structure: WHO: Beverley Callard, an actress from Coronation Street
WHAT: She left a TV show because she got sick and later found out she has cancer
WHERE: In the jungle camp of I'm A Celebrity... South Africa
WHY: To take care of her health and fight cancer, with support from friends

perspectives.description: Beverley had to prioritize her health over finishing the show, showing that well-being is most important.
